title: lichen_l2_enable returns non-void but some paths may return without value
description: lichen_l2.c line 228-280: The function signature is int lichen_l2_enable(), and the else branch (lines 254-279) returns the result of lichen_lora_l2_stop(). However, looking carefully: line 241 returns lichen_lora_l2_start(), line 254-278 return ret. All paths return. No issue - just verifying.
close_reason: Invalid - verified all paths return correctly: line 235 (-ENODEV), line 241 (start result), line 278 (ret from stop)
